serval.name: Serval
serval.description: Serval builds AI agents for IT processes typically outsourced to vendors in India, and is a category leader in the AI for IT services vertical.
serval.my_understanding: AI agents for IT processes typically outsourced to vendors in India and now a category leader in AI for IT services vertical

cartesia.name: Cartesia
cartesia.description: Cartesia builds voice foundation models focused on emotion and tonality, aiming to make AI speech as natural as possible. They rank highly on voice AI leaderboards.
cartesia.my_understanding: Makes voice models focused on emotion and tonality making them as natural as possible. Raised a ton of money from Lightspeed and show up on the top leaderboards for most things Voice AI. Not sure what their differentiation is from ElevenLabs and how they'll win.
